name: hovernet
description: Model-agnostic fleet orchestration for terminal-based AI agents.

scripts.verify:release: bash -n setup.sh && python3 scripts/queue_daemon.py --help >/dev/null && python3 scripts/fleet_status.py --help >/dev/null && python3 examples/dispatch_example.py --help >/dev/null && python3 examples/check_status.py --help >/dev/null && python3 examples/watch_completions.py --help >/dev/null
